top_signals.title: Police raid malware network tied to Russia's Evil Corp hacker group
top_signals.summary: An international operation targeted the SocGholish botnet, which has been linked to the Russia-based cybercrime group Evil Corp.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Permian natural gas production increased faster than crude oil
top_signals.summary: The Permian region's marketed natural gas production grew from 17.2 billion cubic feet per day (Bcf/d) in 2021 to 27.6 Bcf/d in 2025, a 60% increase, according to data from our latest Short Term Energy Outlook. Over the same period, crude oil production grew by 39%, going from 4.7 million barrels per day (b/d) to 6.6 million b/d. The higher growth in natural gas production is the result of increasing gas-oil ratios (GOR).
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Building materials group CRH nears its biggest-ever deal to buy Arcosa
top_signals.summary: Irish company closes in on purchase of Dallas-based construction firm with market capitalisation of almost $7bn

top_signals.summary: Three Indian Tankers Reemerge, Pointing to Hormuz Traffic Uptick  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Every AI Agent Is an Identity. Most Organizations Don't Treat Them That Way
top_signals.summary: AI agents can access data, trigger workflows, deploy code, and interact with critical business systems, often with little oversight. Token Security breaks down why AI agents are becoming a new identity and governance challenge. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
